name: email-ops
description: Autonomous email agent: connects to hotel mailbox via IMAP, AI classifies and drafts responses in sender's language, queues for admin approval, sends via SMTP. Widget-enabled for desktop Activity tab.

BUSINESS_EMAIL.label: From email
BUSINESS_EMAIL.description: From address for outbound emails (e.g. info@rockwoodhotel.com)

BUSINESS_NAME.label: Business name
BUSINESS_NAME.description: Display name for outbound emails (e.g. Rockwood Hotel)

context_sources.label: Recent email threads
context_sources.description: Recent guest conversations, status, classification, language, and latest available draft context.
context_sources.query: SELECT c.id, c.guest_email, c.subject, c.language, c.classification, c.status, c.updated_at, (SELECT v.body FROM versions v WHERE v.conversation_id = c.id AND v.user_id = :user_id ORDER BY v.version_num DESC LIMIT 1) AS latest_context FROM conversations c WHERE c.user_id = :user_id AND (c.subject LIKE :query OR c.guest_email LIKE :query OR c.classification LIKE :query OR c.language LIKE :query) ORDER BY c.updated_at DESC LIMIT :limit

context_sources.label: Business email conventions
context_sources.description: Business rules, FAQ entries, and tone guidance used when reviewing or rewriting draft replies.

prompt_examples: show the hotel tone rules for drafting replies

suggested_components.title: Draft review queue
suggested_components.description: Review draft replies with guest, subject, language, status, and latest context.

suggested_components.title: Draft actions
suggested_components.description: Expose the safe review actions for the selected draft.

prompt_examples: build an interface for reviewing pending guest email drafts

suggested_components.title: Selected draft
suggested_components.description: Show the selected conversation, current draft body, and history cues.

agent_actions.label: Load selected history
agent_actions.description: Load the full version history for the currently selected conversation.
agent_actions.expected_result: Conversation and version history for the selected email thread.

agent_actions.label: Show active conversations
agent_actions.description: Switch the widget to the active conversation queue.
agent_actions.expected_result: The active queue tab is selected.

agent_actions.label: Show sent conversations
agent_actions.description: Switch the widget to the sent conversation archive.
agent_actions.expected_result: The sent conversation tab is selected.

agent_actions.label: Open version history
agent_actions.description: Expand the version history section for the selected conversation.
agent_actions.expected_result: The version history section is visible when the selected conversation has history.

agent_actions.label: Show draft editor
agent_actions.description: Open and focus the editable draft reply field for the selected conversation.
agent_actions.expected_result: The draft editor is open and focused.

agent_actions.label: Show regenerate prompt
agent_actions.description: Open the regeneration instructions field and optionally prefill quoted text from the request.
agent_actions.expected_result: The regeneration prompt is open and focused.

agent_actions.label: Show follow up prompt
agent_actions.description: Open the follow-up prompt for the selected sent conversation and optionally prefill quoted text from the request.
agent_actions.expected_result: The follow-up prompt is open and focused.

agent_actions.label: Send selected draft
agent_actions.description: Send the currently selected draft reply to its selected recipient.
agent_actions.expected_result: The draft is sent and the widget refreshes into the latest queue state.

agent_actions.label: Discard selected conversation
agent_actions.description: Discard the currently selected conversation from the active queue.
agent_actions.expected_result: The conversation is discarded and the widget refreshes.

check_inbox.description: Poll the hotel mailbox via IMAP for new emails. Fetches unseen messages, classifies with AI, drafts responses, queues for approval. Can be called manually or via cron.

receive_email.description: Process an inbound email (called by check_inbox or directly). Classifies intent, drafts response in sender's language, queues for admin approval.

email_send.description: Send an email via SMTP through the hotel's mail server.

conversation_act.description: Take action on a conversation: send, discard, restore, save_edit, regenerate, followup_draft.

prompt_examples: send the selected guest draft after confirmation

conversation_history.description: Get full version history for a conversation.

prompt_examples: show the history for this guest conversation
list active guest conversations waiting on review

conventions_get.description: Get business conventions/guidelines by key or category

prompt_examples: show hotel email tone and FAQ rules

conventions_set.description: Create or update a business convention.

approvals_list.description: Legacy approval bridge: list active conversations with draft replies for older approval UIs.

approvals_act.description: Legacy approval bridge: approve, reject, or revise a pending conversation draft.

widget_approval_queue.description: Legacy widget bridge for older desktop builds.
